title: Johnstone's - Washable Paint - Blue Horizon - Matt Finish - Emulsion Paint - Highly Durable - Stain Resistant - Non Toxic & Low Odour - 12m2 Coverage per Litre - 2.5L
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: No home is immaculate - busy life means that sometimes spills, marks and stains on your walls can be difficult to avoid. With Johnstone's Washable Matt, wiping away mess on your walls has never been easier
This specially formulated paint is highly tough and durable, making it ideal for use in those busy areas of the home where your walls will be protected against everyday's marks and spills
The Matt Emulsion provides a smooth, rich and non-reflective finish, perfect for a contemporary look and to hide surface imperfections
Paint suitable for interior walls and ceilings for your home, with emulsions specifically formulated for all rooms, including kitchens, bathrooms and other areas
A unique, wide range of colours that have been specially selected from the latest interior design trends to give you a stand out look with real impact
description: From the manufacturer Johnstone's Washable Matt Johnstone’s Washable Matt Emulsion is a highly tough and durable paint, meaning everyday marks and spills can easily be wiped away without spoiling the finish. The water based, low odour formulation is also quick drying. Washable Matt is ideal to use to paint busy areas of your home. Scrub resisting - the finished paint surface can be scrubbed to remove stains Stain resisting - the special formulation resists stains from food, drink, crayons and household grime Tough and durable - the formulation resists damage in high traffic areas such as hallways, stairs and children's bedrooms Key Features Wipeable & Durable Covers 30m² per litre Touch dry in 1-2 hours Water Based Matt Finish Tough and Durable Johnstone's Washable paint is part of our Tough Paint range. Ideal for use in the busy areas of the home, such as halls and stairways as scuffs and spills can be easily wiped away. Preparation Checklist Masking Tape Sandpaper Synthetic Paint Brushes Medium Pile Roller and tray Filler and Filling Knife Suitable Surfaces Johnstone's Washable Paint can be used on the following surfaces: Interior walls and ceilings Interior wood Interior metal Wild Instinct allows you to experiment with bolder colours all around your home. Don’t be afraid to introduce pops of colour or creative designs, even in smaller spaces to create impact. Artisan Heritage is perfect for any space that you want to inject some sophisticated creativity. It works well for inviting social spaces within kitchens, dining and living areas. The shades can be used to create an inspiring space in a home office or reading nook, or in a bedroom to create an authentic feeling of luxury. Soothing Solace works well in relaxing spaces of the home such as living rooms and bedrooms, thanks to its soothing vibes and neutral shades. It can also be used to bring a sense of calm to busier kitchens and dining rooms.
